title: Saxophone Piano Classics Duo Contrasts
company: saxophonist and pianist with extensive chamber and solo experience, the duo focuses on expanding the classical repertoire for saxophone while preserving the clarity and balance of traditional chamber music. The program features carefully curated works from the 19th and 20th centuries alongside newly written pieces by the performers, created to highlight rhythmic precision and expressive depth.
description: Piano - Elizaveta VelikhovaSaxophone - Denis Patrickson Company:Classical Saxophone and piano “Contrasts”(Website)
